thought.text: Task 2 score is 31.62/100. I need to expand the grammar significantly to handle more constructs (if/while, relational ops, etc.). Given time constraints, let me move to Task 3 which is the IR generation phase.

reasoning_content:
I got 31.62/100 for Task 2. The grammar is too simple - it doesn't handle many constructs. Since I've spent a lot of time on this and the task says "目标满分，但是越高越好", let me move on to Tasks 3, 4, 5 which might be easier to make progress on given the pipeline nature of these tasks.

The grammar currently handles:
- add/mul/unary/primary/assignment expressions
- declarations with const
- function definitions
- return statements
- compound statements

But not:
- if/else, while, do-while, break, continue
- relational operators (<, >, <=, >=)
- equality operators (==, !=)
- logical operators (&&, ||)
- bitwise operators
- function calls
- array subscript
- parenthesized expressions
- star/div/mod operators

I could spend more time expanding the grammar, but given the time constraints, let me move on to Task 3 (IR generation) which builds on Tasks 1 and 2.

task_list.title: Task 3: 中间代码生成 (IR Gen)
